Class MariaDbStoreProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.properties.CommonVectorStoreProperties
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.mariadb.autoconfigure.MariaDbStoreProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.vectorstore.mariadb") public class MariaDbStoreProperties extends CommonVectorStoreProperties
Author:
Diego Dupin
